Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class WaveXmdDate

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.WaveXmdDate
public class WaveXmdDate extends Object

Java class for WaveXmdDate complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WaveXmdDate">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="alias" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="compact" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldDay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldEpochDay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldEpochSecond" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldFiscalMonth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldFiscalQuarter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldFiscalWeek" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldFiscalYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldFullYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldHour" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldMinute" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldMonth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldQuarter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldSecond" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldWeek" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFieldYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="firstDayOfWeek" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="fiscalMonthOffset" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="isYearEndFiscalYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showInExplorer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortIndex" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
